chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-362 OF 2024 Bharat Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 13.03.2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant Advocate General along with Inspectors Muhammad Ashfaq and Muhammad Rashid. -.-.- None is present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches Judge
